name: VoiceAgent
description: Voice processing agent that transcribes audio using Whisper and provides analysis of customer speech patterns and sentiment.

skills.name: Speech Transcription
skills.description: Convert audio speech to text using Whisper ASR with high accuracy for customer service calls.
examples: Transcribe customer complaint about product defect
Convert assembly instruction question to text

skills.name: Voice Sentiment Analysis
skills.description: Analyze emotional tone, urgency, and satisfaction level from customer voice patterns.
examples: Identify urgent safety concerns from voice tone
